ddls:
CREATE TABLE "options_trading_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row of data */,
  "moneyness" TEXT /* Moneyness level of the options (e.g., < 0.8, 0.8 - 1.0, 1.0 - 1.2, > 1.2) */,
  "maturity" TEXT /* Maturity period of the options (e.g., < 30 days, 31 - 90 days, 91 - 180 days, > 180 days) */,
  "trades_less_0_8" INTEGER /* Number of trades for options with moneyness < 0.8 */,
  "trades_0_8_to_1_0" INTEGER /* Number of trades for options with moneyness 0.8 - 1.0 */,
  "trades_1_0_to_1_2" INTEGER /* Number of trades for options with moneyness 1.0 - 1.2 */,
  "trades_greater_1_2" INTEGER /* Number of trades for options with moneyness > 1.2 */,
  "trades_subtotal" INTEGER /* Subtotal of trades for the given maturity period */,
  "avg_price_less_0_8" REAL /* Average price for options with moneyness < 0.8 */,
  "avg_price_0_8_to_1_0" REAL /* Average price for options with moneyness 0.8 - 1.0 */,
  "avg_price_1_0_to_1_2" REAL /* Average price for options with moneyness 1.0 - 1.2 */,
  "avg_price_greater_1_2" REAL /* Average price for options with moneyness > 1.2 */,
  "avg_price_subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal of average prices for the given maturity period */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades across all moneyness levels for the given maturity period */,
  "total_avg_price" REAL /* Total average price across all moneyness levels for the given maturity period */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade for historical analysis */,
  "financial_instrument" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, index, etc.) */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the options */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset of the options */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest of the options */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* Implied volatility of the options */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Bid price of the options */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Ask price of the options */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last price of the trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the permissions table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table indicating who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "financial_instrument" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the options */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset of the options */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest of the options */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* Implied volatility of the options */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Bid price of the options */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Ask price of the options */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last price of the trade */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table indicating the trader */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
